Log.LocationDesc: "I10 E County Line Rd Indio Exit 87"

details.IncidentDetail: "[8] PER COORDS SHOWING JSO KNOBB HILL RD"
"[2] MOD FOG OR LIGHT SMOKE/SEE IF THERE IS A FIRE"
